pr.title: Record: Scylla + GPTQ + BH3072 — val_bpb 1.0856 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Scylla tokenization with AR self-gen GPTQ int6 on a VRL-enhanced 11-layer GQA architecture plus BigramHash compression to stay under 16MB.
techniques: Scylla tokenizer + BigramHash 3072x112 for denser tokens
AR self-gen Full Hessian GPTQ int6 with Cholesky compensation
VRL+XSA layers, QK-Gain, EMA+SWA, Late QAT to polish compressed model
